title: AWF Configuration
description: JSON/YAML configuration for awf CLI. CLI flags override config file values. See https://github.com/github/gh-aw-firewall for documentation.

$schema.description: JSON Schema URL for IDE validation and autocomplete.

allowDomains.description: Domains that the agent is allowed to reach. Both the bare domain and all subdomains are permitted (e.g. "github.com" also allows "api.github.com").

blockDomains.description: Domains that are explicitly blocked, overriding allowDomains.

dnsServers.description: DNS servers to use inside the container. Defaults to Google DNS (8.8.8.8, 8.8.4.4). Accepts IPv4 and IPv6 addresses.

upstreamProxy.description: Upstream HTTP proxy URL (e.g. "http://proxy.corp.example.com:8080"). When set, the AWF Squid proxy forwards traffic through this proxy.

apiProxy.description: API proxy sidecar configuration. The sidecar injects real API credentials so the agent never has direct access to them.

enabled.description: Enable the API proxy sidecar container.

enableOpenCode.description: Enable the OpenCode API proxy endpoint (port 10004).

anthropicAutoCache.description: Automatically apply Anthropic prompt-cache optimizations on /v1/messages requests.

anthropicCacheTailTtl.description: TTL for Anthropic cache tail optimization. Only applies when anthropicAutoCache is enabled. Allowed values: "5m" or "1h".

targets.description: Override upstream API endpoints for each provider.

copilot.description: GitHub Copilot API target override (basePath not supported).

models.description: Model alias mapping. Keys are canonical model names; values are arrays of alternative names or patterns that should be rewritten to the canonical name.

sslBump.description: Enable SSL bumping (TLS interception) in the Squid proxy. Requires a custom CA certificate.

enableDlp.description: Enable Data Loss Prevention (DLP) inspection of outbound traffic.

enableHostAccess.description: Mount the host filesystem (read-only for system paths, read-write for the workspace). Enabled by default; set to false to run without host filesystem access.

allowHostPorts.description: Host TCP ports the agent may connect to (e.g. local dev services). Accepts a single port string or an array of port strings.

allowHostServicePorts.description: Named service ports on the host that the agent may connect to. Accepts a single port string or an array of port strings.

caCert.description: Path to the CA certificate for DIFC proxy TLS verification.

memoryLimit.description: Docker memory limit for the agent container (e.g. "4g", "512m"). Uses Docker memory limit syntax.

agentTimeout.description: Maximum time (in minutes) the agent command is allowed to run.

enableDind.description: Enable Docker-in-Docker support inside the agent container.

workDir.description: Host path used as the AWF working directory for generated configs and logs. Defaults to a temporary directory.

containerWorkDir.description: Working directory inside the agent container.

imageRegistry.description: Container image registry to pull from. Defaults to "ghcr.io/github/gh-aw-firewall".

imageTag.description: Container image tag to use. Defaults to "latest".

skipPull.description: Skip pulling container images (use locally cached images).

buildLocal.description: Build container images from source instead of pulling from the registry.

agentImage.description: Override the agent container image (e.g. for a GitHub Actions parity image).

tty.description: Allocate a pseudo-TTY for the agent container.

dockerHost.description: Docker daemon socket or host to connect to (e.g. "unix:///var/run/docker.sock").

environment.description: Environment variable propagation into the agent container.

envFile.description: Path to a .env file whose variables are injected into the agent container.

envAll.description: Forward all host environment variables into the agent container. Use with caution — may expose secrets.

excludeEnv.description: Environment variable names to exclude when envAll is true.

diagnosticLogs.description: Enable diagnostic logging (Squid access logs, iptables logs). Logs are written to the work directory.

proxyLogsDir.description: Directory path for Squid proxy access logs.

sessionStateDir.description: Directory path for agent session state (e.g. conversation history). Set to "/tmp/gh-aw/sandbox/agent/session-state" for Copilot agent runs.

requestsPerMinute.description: Maximum number of HTTP requests per minute.

requestsPerHour.description: Maximum number of HTTP requests per hour.

bytesPerMinute.description: Maximum number of bytes transferred per minute.

basePath.description: Override the provider API base path.

providerHostOnlyTarget.description: API provider target override (host only; basePath not supported).
